products.searchText: apache airflow apache workflow-orchestration airflow airflow webserver airflow api server web workflow scheduler docker apache airflow apache workflow-orchestration airflow airflow webserver airflow api server web workflow scheduler docker airflow-webserver http 8080 http / /login/ airflow airflow airflow:airflow active docker-image vendor-docs vendor-doc the official docker compose quickstart creates an account with login airflow and password airflow. applies to the docker compose quickstart, which the airflow docs describe as suitable for learning and exploration, not production. airflow-webserver 8080 http / /login/ docker-compose quickstart apache airflow apache workflow-orchestration airflow airflow webserver airflow api server web workflow scheduler docker airflow-webserver http 8080 http / /login/ admin admin: no-default upstream vendor-docs vendor-doc the standalone command starts airflow with an auto-generated admin password rather than a fixed default password. check the local airflow output or generated password file for standalone installs. airflow-webserver 8080 http / /login/ standalone

grafana grafana labs observability-dashboard grafana dashboard grafana server web monitoring observability dashboard grafana grafana labs observability-dashboard grafana dashboard grafana server web monitoring observability dashboard grafana http 3000 http https /login admin admin admin:admin active upstream vendor-docs vendor-doc grafana documentation says first-time sign-in uses admin for both username and password unless configured differently. successful first login prompts the user to change the password. grafana 3000 http https /login current

jenkins jenkins ci-cd jenkins ci jenkins controller web ci-cd automation jenkins jenkins ci-cd jenkins ci jenkins controller web ci-cd automation jenkins http 8080 http https /login / admin admin: no-default upstream vendor-docs vendor-doc jenkins uses an initial administrator password generated on the server, not a fixed default password. the generated password is commonly stored under the jenkins home secrets directory and is required by the setup wizard. jenkins 8080 http https /login / current

opensearch dashboards opensearch project search-analytics-dashboard opensearch opensearch dashboard web search analytics dashboard opensearch dashboards opensearch project search-analytics-dashboard opensearch opensearch dashboard web search analytics dashboard opensearch-dashboards http 5601 http https / admin admin admin:admin historical sample-config vendor-docs vendor-doc opensearch notes that the default admin password was removed starting in 2.12.0. applies to older security demo configurations; current fresh installs require a custom admin password. opensearch-dashboards 5601 http https / <= 2.11.1 security demo configuration opensearch dashboards opensearch project search-analytics-dashboard opensearch opensearch dashboard web search analytics dashboard opensearch-dashboards http 5601 http https / admin admin: no-default upstream vendor-docs vendor-doc fresh installs require setting a custom admin password with opensearch_initial_admin_password. the current default username is admin, but the password is user-defined. opensearch-dashboards 5601 http https / >= 2.12.0
